scripts.db:push: echo "TODO: add Drizzle migrations in Phase 0"
scripts.indexer:dev: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml up -d --build rpc-router envio-postgres envio-hasura envio-indexer
scripts.indexer:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml up -d --build rpc-router envio-postgres envio-hasura envio-indexer
scripts.indexer:down: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml stop envio-indexer envio-hasura envio-postgres
scripts.indexer:logs: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml logs -f envio-indexer
scripts.indexer:ps: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml ps rpc-router envio-postgres envio-hasura envio-indexer
scripts.indexer:reset: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.indexer.yml run --rm --service-ports envio-indexer pnpm exec envio start -r
